functions.name: CodeEditor
params:
{
  value,
  height = '100%',
  disabled = false,
  autoDetectLanguage = true,
  options = {},
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

functions.name: JsonEditor
params:
{
  value,
  height = 500,
  disabled = false,
  placeholder = '{}',
  options: propOptions,
  onChange,
  onReady,
  onError,
}

functions.name: MarkdownEditor
params:
{
  value,
  height = '100%',
  disabled = false,
  placeholder,
  options = {},
  enableExport = false,
  uploadImage,
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

functions.name: useTiptapEditor
params:
{
  value,
  disabled = false,
  uploadImage,
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

callGraph.callee:
editor
          .chain()
          .focus()
          .insertContent({
            type: 'codeBlock',
            attrs: { language: codeBlockLanguage },
            content: [{ type: 'text', text: code }],
          })
          .run
(editor.chain().focus() as any).setVideo({ src: url, width: videoWidth }).run

(editor.chain().focus() as any)
          .setIframe({
            src: url,
            width: iframeWidth,
            height: iframeHeight,
            title: iframeTitle || undefined,
            allowfullscreen: iframeAllowFullscreen,
          })
          .run
